step_rationale: Platelet adhesion substrate; reduced in STEMI platelet releasate; cell adhesion hub in plaque instability.
mechanism: Fibronectin mediates platelet adhesion to exposed matrix and fibroblast paracrine signaling; dysregulation marks plaque instability and thrombotic coronary events.
